ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Estimated population of the region */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update for the region */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the region (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each daily case record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the data was collected */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "confirmed" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases */,
  "recovered_migrated" INTEGER /* Number of recovered or migrated cases */,
  "deceased" INTEGER /* Number of deceased cases */,
  "reported_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who reported the data */,
  "reported_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was reported */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Number of active cases (confirmed - recovered_migrated - deceased) */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new cases reported on the given date */,
  "total_tests" INTEGER /* Total number of tests conducted on the given date */,
  "positive_rate" REAL /* Percentage of positive tests on the given date */,
  "vaccinated_population" INTEGER /* Number of vaccinated individuals in the region */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is vaccinated */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_cases_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_cases_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data entry, analyst, admin) */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the user is associated with */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Date of the last password change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date of the last update for the data source */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_verification" TEXT /* Date of the last verification of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_sources" (
  "case_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case-source link */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the daily case record */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data source */,
  "verification_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was last verified */,
  "verification_status" TEXT /* Verification status (e.g., verified, unverified) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_sources_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_sources_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES daily_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the alert is relevant */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., threshold exceeded, significant change) */,
  "threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold value that triggered the alert */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was sent */,
  "sent_to" TEXT /* Email or contact information of the recipient */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Current status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the resolution of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the report is for */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the report period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the report period */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who generated the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Current status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date of the last modification of the report */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who last modified the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data revision */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the daily case record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the revision */,
  "confirmed" INTEGER /* Revised number of confirmed cases */,
  "recovered_migrated" INTEGER /* Revised number of recovered or migrated cases */,
  "deceased" INTEGER /* Revised number of deceased cases */,
  "revised_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who made the revision */,
  "revised_date" TEXT /* Date the revision was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the revision */,
  "revision_status" TEXT /* Current status of the revision (e.g., pending, approved) */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the revision was approved */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who approved the revision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_revisions_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES daily_cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view, edit) */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the user is associated with */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser or device */,
  "action" TEXT /* Details about the access action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
